criteria.criterion: Ollama timeout auto-switches to cloud, returns valid stream
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set: chat() uses Anthropic API
No API key: throws 'OPENAI_API_KEY not set'
WebSocket device registration: getDevices() includes device
SIGINT: HTTP+WS server closes within 5s, exit code 0
CDN URL returns valid JSON, cache written
README has install methods + all REST endpoints with examples
